title: Sharing an Umbrella in the Rain

tree.setup: You're caught in the rain without an umbrella. A kind stranger offers to share theirs as you both walk toward the subway station.
tree.setup_zh: 你被雨淋到了，没有伞。一个好心的陌生人让你和他一起撑伞走向地铁站。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你没带伞吧？来，一起走吧，地铁站就在前面。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ méi dài sǎn ba? Lái, yīqǐ zǒu ba, dìtiě zhàn jiù zài qiánmiàn.
turns.text_en: You don't have an umbrella, right? Come, let's walk together — the subway station is just ahead.

options.text_zh: 太谢谢了！今天出门的时候还是晴天呢。你真好心。
options.text_pinyin: Tài xièxie le! Jīntiān chūmén de shíhou háishi qíngtiān ne. Nǐ zhēn hǎoxīn.
options.text_en: Thank you so much! It was sunny when I left home. You're very kind.
options.feedback: Grateful and opens a conversation naturally.

options.text_pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒ bú pà yǔ.
options.text_en: It's fine, I don't mind rain.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 天气预报说今天下午会下雨，所以我出门就带了伞。你在这边工作吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Tiānqì yùbào shuō jīntiān xiàwǔ huì xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ chūmén jiù dài le sǎn. Nǐ zài zhè biān gōngzuò ma?
turns.text_en: The forecast said rain this afternoon, so I brought my umbrella. Do you work around here?

options.text_zh: 嗯，在前面那栋楼上班。以后我要多看天气预报了！你也在这附近上班吗？
options.text_pinyin: En, zài qiánmiàn nà dòng lóu shàngbān. Yǐhòu wǒ yào duō kàn tiānqì yùbào le! Nǐ yě zài zhè fùjìn shàngbān ma?
options.text_en: Yeah, in that building up ahead. I should check the forecast more! Do you work nearby too?

options.feedback: Barely engaging with a kind stranger.

tree.cultural_note: Sharing an umbrella with a stranger is a beautiful everyday act of kindness in China. Brief conversations with strangers during these moments often feel unexpectedly warm and human.
